# Light-footed Steed

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

![[300016.png]]

*Mount.*

---

Attach to a **_Rohan_** hero. Restricted.
**Response**: After a character you control leaves play, exhaust Light-footed Steed to ready attached hero. Then, if the character that left play was unique, attached hero gets +1 ATK until the end of the round.

---

> *“…and don’t forget their horses! They can see the night-breeze, or so it’s said.” —Ugluk, The Two Towers*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Children of Eorl]] #16
